name: Gulf AOR Ground Routes
description: Primary overland transit routes — Dubai, Doha, Bahrain to Muscat and Riyadh. As of 2026-03-03.

properties.label: Dubai → Muscat
properties.risk_note: E11/E611 coastal hwy; Jebel Ali and Fujairah corridor. Preferred overland exit UAE→Oman.

properties.label: Dubai → Riyadh
properties.risk_note: Al Ghuwaifat/Silaa border (UAE/Saudi) — OPEN. ~1,000km. E611 to Abu Dhabi then Saudi hwy.

properties.label: Doha → Muscat
properties.risk_note: Crosses UAE. Salwa border (Qatar/Saudi) then E11 UAE coastal. Longer route.

properties.label: Doha → Riyadh
properties.risk_note: Salwa border crossing (Qatar/Saudi) — check status. Inland Saudi highway ~500km.

properties.label: Bahrain → Muscat
properties.risk_note: King Fahd Causeway (OPEN) then Saudi/UAE via Al Ghuwaifat. Long transit ~1,400km.

properties.label: Bahrain → Riyadh
properties.risk_note: King Fahd Causeway (OPEN). ~450km direct Saudi highway. Most reliable route.
